steps.title: Target self-understanding
steps.content: The claim says Whitman suggests readers have not fully understood themselves. The strongest evidence must directly show the addressed reader as unaware of their own identity or nature.

steps.title: Reject off-target quotations
steps.content: B describes readers as immense. C focuses on the speaker's regret and devotion. D says the speaker understands readers, not that readers misunderstand themselves. The quotation saying readers have not known what they are directly supports the claim. The answer is A.
